purpose: Implement the Phase 10 P0 combat-target-effect-adapter contract by adding a runtime consumer for targetEffectsOnHit and targetEffectsOnCritical payloads collected by CombatOptionResolver.
implementationScope: Consume targetEffectsOnHit and targetEffectsOnCritical payloads already carried by attack results.
Normalize target effect metadata into safe application plans.
Apply supported condition-track shift effects through ActorEngine.setConditionStep.
Apply persistent condition flag through ActorEngine.setConditionPersistent when requested.
Surface unsupported target effects as manual notes instead of silently dropping them.
nonGoals: No automatic movement, prone, flat-footed, attack penalty, or custom active-effect handler in this slice.
unlocksPhase9Families: targetEffectsOnHit no longer remain only inert chat/context data
targetEffectsOnCritical has a supported adapter path
condition-track hit/critical riders can be promoted from metadata-only partials after individual metadata is normalized
unsupported target effects become visible manual notes rather than silent failures
remainingWork: Wire UI/chat buttons to call CombatTargetEffectAdapter.applyFromAttackResult where automatic application is desired.
Add dedicated handlers for prone, flat-footed, penalties, movement interruption, and custom active-effect target riders.
Normalize individual feat metadata to supported target effect types before promotion.
